stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What does the TCAS symbol represent?

options.a: A Resolution Advisory, inside 6 NM and 1200 ft, 100 ft above me, descending.
options.b: A Resolution Advisory, inside 6 NM and 1200 ft, 100 ft below me, descending.
options.c: A Resolution Advisory, inside 6 NM and 1200 ft, 100 ft above me, climbing.
options.d: A Resolution Advisory, inside 6 NM and 1200 ft, 100 ft below me, climbing.
